title: デビュー戦の後に・達筆な焼き鳥屋

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... I... didn't get first!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Buuut I ran really fast! Wasn't that amazing?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Thanks! I'm not even tired at all! I felt like I was
just having fun!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I wanna keep racing! I get to run more after my
debut, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's probably a good idea to participate in a
variety of races to build up her experience
anyway.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And while she's at it, I'm sure she'll find a new
race that she really wants to shoot for too.
choice_data_list:
You know it! You're going to do so much
running!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hm? Whaaat?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Look over there! My friends from the shopping
district are here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I follow Haru Urara's line of sight and see her
supportive shopping district friends all grouped
together.

text_block_list.name: Energetic Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text: Urara's here! Okay, everyone... now!

text_block_list.name: Shopkeepers
text_block_list.text: Congrats on your debut!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Flap...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Wow! You made a banner for me?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The shopkeepers hold up a banner that says
"Congratulations on your debut, Urara!"

text_block_list.name: Kind Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text:
I got so excited seeing you run so fast on the
track!

text_block_list.name: Happy Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text: We're gonna be with you all the way!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Aww, thanks! I'm gonna give it my all!

text_block_list.name: Shopkeepers
text_block_list.text: Yeah! You can do it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's only just debuted, but it already feels like
they're throwing a festival for her. It seems like
the shopkeepers really love Haru Urara.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since they're expecting great things from Haru
Urara, I promise to train her well!
